framework.name: Agents are not microservices
framework.description: Core argument that agent workloads break the microservice identity model because behavior is non-deterministic, context-dependent, and diverges across instances — meaning service-level identity is insufficient for compliance/auditing.
framework.raw_quote: AI Agents are not microservices, APIs, or traditional stateless workloads. They are non-deterministic and their behavior cannot be fully defined by looking at the code.

source.title: Agent Identity and Access Management - Can SPIFFE Work?
